text_qpc_hafs: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمۡۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُ لَوۡ يَفۡتَدِي مِنۡ عَذَابِ يَوۡمِئِذِۭ بِبَنِيهِ ١١
text_uthmani: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمْ ۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلْمُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدِى مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْمِئِذٍۭ بِبَنِيهِ

translation.text: They will be made to see each other

translations.text: even when they are within sight of one another. The guilty person will wish he could save himself from the suffering of that Day by sacrificing his sons,
his spouse, his brother,
the kinsfolk who gave him shelter,

text_qpc_hafs: وَمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ جَمِيعٗا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ ١٤
text_uthmani: وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ

translations.text: and everyone on earth, if it could save him.
But no! There is a raging flame

translation.text: of the skin of the head

translations.text: that strips away the skin,
and it will claim everyone who rejects the truth, turns away,
amasses wealth and hoards it.
Man was truly created anxious:
he is fretful when misfortune touches him,
but tight-fisted when good fortune comes his way.
Not so those who pray
and are constant in their prayers;
who give a due share of their wealth
to beggars and the deprived;
who believe in the Day of Judgement

text_qpc_hafs: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنۡ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشۡفِقُونَ ٢٧
text_uthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ

translations.text: and fear the punishment of their Lord––
none may feel wholly secure from it––
who guard their chastity

text_qpc_hafs: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزۡوَٰجِهِمۡ أَوۡ مَا مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُهُمۡ فَإِنَّهُمۡ غَيۡرُ مَلُومِينَ ٣٠
text_uthmani: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ

translations.text: from all but their spouses or their slave-girls––there is no blame attached to [relations with] these,

text_qpc_hafs: فَمَنِ ٱبۡتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡعَادُونَ ٣١
text_uthmani: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ

translations.text: but those whose desires exceed this limit are truly transgressors––
who are faithful to their trusts and their pledges;
who give honest testimony
and are steadfast in their prayers.
They will be honoured in Gardens of bliss.
What is wrong with the disbelievers? Why do they rush to peer at you [Prophet],
from right and left, in crowds?

text_qpc_hafs: أَيَطۡمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيٕٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَن يُدۡخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٖ ٣٨
text_uthmani: أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍ

translations.text: Does every one of them expect to enter a Garden of bliss?
No! We created them from the substance they know,
